name: sessions/13172420826211369022
title: Create and Verify Pipeline Script Stubs
prompt:
Working in the repo root (MasumRab/kaggle-notebooks-analysis):

Check which pipeline scripts are missing:
  ls scripts/ | sort

For any of the following that are absent, create a minimal stub:
  notebook_triage.py, inject_data_loader.py

Template for each stub:

  #!/usr/bin/env python3
  """Stub: <script name> — not yet implemented."""
  import argparse, sys

  def main():
      parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
      parser.add_argument("--slug", required=True)
      parser.add_argument("--notebook", default=None)
      args = parser.parse_args()
      print(f"[STUB] {__file__}: not yet implemented for slug={args.slug}")
      sys.exit(0)

  if __name__ == "__main__":
      main()

Sanity check — run the orchestrator through phases 1-3 on house-prices and
confirm it reaches each stub, prints the STUB message, and continues:
  python scripts/run_pipeline.py house-prices --from-phase 1 --to-phase 3 \
      --notebook notebooks/house-prices/local/00-pipeline.ipynb

Commit:
  git add scripts/
  git commit -m "feat: stub scripts for unimplemented pipeline phases"

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage: No changes required: files already present

pullRequest.title: No changes: required files already present
pullRequest.description:
The prompt asked to check if `notebook_triage.py` and `inject_data_loader.py` were absent and, if so, create stubs for them. It was verified that both files already existed in the repository as complete implementations. Therefore, no changes were required and the task was marked completed without any modifications to the codebase.
